syz_read_part_table(0x5e3, &(0x7f0000001100)="$")
r0 = syz_open_dev$loop(&(0x7f00000000c0), 0x0, 0x0)
ioctl$LOOP_SET_BLOCK_SIZE(r0, 0x4c09, 0x8000)
mount(&(0x7f0000000040)=@filename='./file1\x00', &(0x7f0000000000)='./file0\x00', &(0x7f0000000100)='qnx4\x00', 0x2008080, 0x0)
